definitions.text: Expressing distance or motion. From (a place); off. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: Take the chicken out of the freezer.
He hasn't been well of late.
Take the chicken out of the freezer.

definitions.text: Since, from (a given time, earlier state etc.).
examples: He hasn't been well of late.

definitions.text: Eye dialect spelling of have and 've, chiefly in depictions of colloquial speech.
